name: gest-cloudflare-collector
description: Deployable Gest collector template for Cloudflare Workers.

scripts.deploy: wrangler d1 migrations apply RAW_DB --remote && wrangler deploy

RAW_BUCKET.description: R2 bucket that stores raw platform request bodies as durable source truth.

RAW_DB.description: D1 database for delivery records, dedupe records, journal events, outbox rows, dispatch work, rate limits, and DLQ rows.

WORK_QUEUE.description: Cloudflare Queue that carries normalized work from webhook ingress to the runtime consumer.

LANE_DO.description: Durable Object class used for lane-local sequencing and platform-specific coordination.

DISCORD_GATEWAY_DO.description: Durable Object class used to host the optional Discord gateway runner.

SLACK_SIGNING_SECRET.description: Slack app signing secret for verifying Events API requests.

GITHUB_WEBHOOK_SECRET.description: GitHub webhook secret used for X-Hub-Signature-256 verification.

DISCORD_PUBLIC_KEY.description: Discord application public key for interaction signature verification.

DISCORD_GATEWAY_ADMIN_TOKEN.description: Bearer token required to start or stop the Discord gateway Durable Object admin route.

TELEGRAM_SECRET_TOKEN.description: Telegram webhook secret token sent in X-Telegram-Bot-Api-Secret-Token.

SLACK_BOT_TOKEN.description: Optional outbound Slack dispatch token for this single-install template.
